parents.subject: LU-18456 trash: mark LUSTRE_UNRM_FL for a file moving to trash

commit.subject: LU-18456 tcu: add "notcu" MDT mount option to disable TCU setup
commit.message:
LU-18456 tcu: add "notcu" MDT mount option to disable TCU setup

Add "notcu" MDT mount option to disable TCU initialization during
MDT stack setup.

The server usually mounts without this option and will initialize
the Trash Can dir on MDT during the mount by default.

Change-Id: Ib083c199941d51c6e05b0efa3784a4ddb83e86a0
Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
